title: Parallax feature-state (contract-generation ledger)
description: Per-feature, generation-spanning state at .parallax/<slug>/feature-state.json. Identifies the feature across contract generations (a /parallax:resolve cycle bumps the generation and mints a new run_id while keeping feature_id + slug). Written ONLY by scripts/resolution.py. See DESIGN_v0.31_safe_completion.md §7.2.

feature_id.description: Stable UUID across all generations of this feature.

generation.description: Current contract generation; a resolution increments it by exactly 1.

active_run_id.description: run_id of the active generation's run-state.

parent_run_id.description: run_id of the previous generation, or null for generation 1.

generation_base_oid.description: git oid the active generation's blind run started from (fresh origin/<epic> tip at restart).

feature_tip_before_generation.description: feature ref oid just before this generation's append-only restart commit (preserved in ancestry).

contract_hash.description: Hash of the active normative contract (spec/slices/validation/slices.lock), as produced by scripts/contract-hash.sh (a git hash-object id).

resolution_chain.description: Ordered applied resolution batch ids (RB-0001, RB-0002, ...). Length == generation - 1.
